name: spin-clash
description: Static single-player spinning-top arena battle prototype refactor.

scripts.check:syntax: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cp=require('child_process'); for (const name of fs.readdirSync('src')) { if (!name.endsWith('.js')) continue; cp.execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--check', path.join('src', name)], { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.preflight: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:repo && npm run check:docs && npm run check:dom && npm run check:config && npm run check:analytics && npm run check:ui
scripts.verify:release: npm run preflight && npm run build:static && npm run check:static
